channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'You can’t hide the sound of an engine' — Inside the revolutionary Czech AI acoustic shield designed to hunt low-flying drones, which could soon come to a street near you
item.description: Modern drones have evolved from a nuisance factor to a key weapon in conflicts - could an acoustic shield be the answer?

item.title: Android 17 arrive aujourd’hui : voici les nouveautés et les smartphones compatibles
item.description: Android 17 commence son déploiement aujourd'hui sur les Pixel. Au menu : des bulles flottantes pour toutes les applis, du ménage dans les réglages et un cran de sécurité supplémentaire contre le vol.

item.title: How to watch Iraq vs Norway: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Iraq vs Norway for free online and from anywhere as Erling Haaland prepares for his long-awaited FIFA World Cup debut.

item.title: Walmart's rival Prime Day sale starts next week — here are 18 deals worth shopping right now from Ninja, Apple, Bissell, Samsung, and more
item.description: Walmart's rival Prime Day sale kicks off next week, and I'm breaking down everything you need to know, plus today's best deals from Ninja, Apple, Dyson, and more.

item.title: The EU won't pursue a mandatory game preservation law
item.description: The European Commission says it can't force publishers to preserve video games, citing existing copyright and IP law.

item.title: Maine takes down its data breach notification portal after it is flooded by fake claims
item.description: Someone has been posting fake data breach notifications, forcing the Maine Attorney General's Office to act.

item.title: All the latest news on Android 17, Wear OS 7, and Android XR
item.description: Google’s Android 17 update includes highlights like new floating “Bubble” app windows for easier multitasking, a Screen Reaction recording mode, and a 50/50 split gaming mode for foldable phones. Meanwhile, Wear OS 7 brings Live Updates, better battery life for smart watches, and prepares connections for new Android XR smart glasses that will launch this […]...

item.title: 10 underrated Apple Watch features you can set up in minutes
item.description: These might not be the most popular or well-known Apple Watch features, but we think they're worth using and setting up.

item.title: Qualcomm wants to be the chip inside whatever replaces your smartphone, and it just announced two products toward that end
item.description: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said Tuesday that the company is working on over 40 different AI wearable devices — including jewelry, earbuds with cameras, pins, and watches — a sign of how aggressively the chipmaker is betting that the next major computing platform won't be a phone.

item.title: Why the Reflecting Pool Is Full of Algae After Trump's Renovation
item.description: Warm weather has fueled a bloom that National Park Service workers are trying to kill using everything from hydrogen peroxide to nanobubbles ahead of July 4 celebrations.

item.title: Xfinity introduces same-day Wi-Fi for new customers.
item.description: In some markets, new Xfinity customers can get their wifi set up same-day.

item.title: Bug in FIFA World Cup internal system gave anyone ability to modify TV stream
item.description: A security researcher said a flaw in FIFA’s online platforms allowed her to access several internal systems, including one that could have allowed her to take control of the TV stream of every World Cup match.

item.title: Android 17 arrives on Pixel phones today
item.description: Following its official debut last month, Google is now rolling out Android 17 to compatible Pixel phones, alongside additional exclusive features as part of the June Pixel Drop. Not every feature announced alongside the OS at the pre-I/O Android Show is available today though. Android 17 itself is arriving on Pixel phones today, and Google […]

item.title: Google launches Wear OS 7 with Live Updates and a battery life boost
item.description: Google's Wear OS 7 update is starting to roll out today for the Pixel Watch 2, 3, and 4 , adding a new Live Updates feature that tracks live events from your Android smart watch. Live Updates will now sync with Wear OS devices, so updates like sports scores or an ongoing meal delivery will […]

item.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
item.description: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.

item.title: Google launches 'bubble' multi-tasking and foldable gaming mode with Android 17
item.description: Google has started rolling out Android 17.

item.title: Wear OS 7 arrives to Pixel watches with Gemini AI and live updates
item.description: Wear OS 7 is now live for Pixel watches, with a new interface, notifications and Gemini features.

item.title: How to watch Portugal vs. DR Congo online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Portugal vs. DR Congo in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: J’ai testé le TV Sony Bravia 9 II : le Mini LED True RGB de référence ?
item.description: La série Bravia 9 II inaugure la technologie True RGB Mini LED sur un téléviseur grand public de la marque, avec un rétroéclairage ultra dense, un traitement antireflet inédit chez Sony et une plateforme Google TV très complète. J’ai pu l’essayer pendant un moment et en voici mes impressions.

item.title: ‘Dangerous’ AI Models Are Coming No Matter What
item.description: The US government crackdown on Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 hides a glaring truth: AI models with advanced hacking capabilities will soon be the norm.

item.title: Mobileye’s US robotaxi launch will put it on both sides of the AV business
item.description: Mobileye apparently wants to own some of the robotaxi market, even if that puts it in direct competition with companies it supplies its self-driving system to.

item.title: Rivian cuts hundreds of workers after R2 deliveries start
item.description: The company said the cuts were part of a restructuring meant to help scale to profitability. Rivian recently pushed back its profitability goal to invest in autonomy.

item.title: Stanford's DeLM cuts multi-agent task costs 50% — without a central orchestrator
item.description: One of the assumptions behind today’s AI frameworks is that agents require a “boss” at the center; this orchestrator runs the show, routes requests, and makes sure the whole system doesn’t descend into chaos. That assumption may be wrong, and the cost of carrying it could be measured in inference dollars and coordination latency. A new Stanford framework called a decentralized language model, or DeLM, is built on the premise that agents can coordinate directly, without routing every update through a central controller.DeLM's shared knowledge base serves as a “common communication substrate” so...
